name: go2-mcp-control
description: Drive the Unitree Go2 EDU in natural language through Claude: a 2-service app group (motion API over DDS + a FastMCP-over-HTTP server exposing the dog's motion/gesture surface as MCP tools).

variables.name: MCP_PORT
variables.description: Port the FastMCP HTTP server listens on — register it with `claude mcp add --transport http go2 http://<device>:<port>/mcp`

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: Go2 main-controller IP on the 192.168.123.0/24 network

variables.name: NETWORK_INTERFACE
variables.description: NIC on the deploy host that has the 192.168.123.0/24 address. On the Go2's onboard Jetson this is normally 'eth0'.
